description: Loop metric (R4): build-gated turns to green per toolbox (model-dependent; harness is the deliverable).
notes: metric: build-gated turns to green (iterations_to_green), build invocations; lower is better
harness-first: the harness is the deliverable; numbers are recorded when the claude CLI and a model are provisioned
execution opt-in required: set FUSE_LOOP_RUN=1 to run the model-driven arms.
would sample 8 PR(s): NodaTime#621, NodaTime#620, Scrutor#6, Scrutor#4, Specification#502, Specification#196, eShopOnWeb#949, eShopOnWeb#878
